name: Daniel Reiss
impactIntro: Between the logos and the deadlines, I've also done some things just because I wanted to. Built tech to fight poverty. Developed content strategy for people bringing clean water to the world. Learned to farm. Apprenticed at an apple orchard. Spent time with a chimpanzee. The work that matters most to me has always been the work that makes something a little better.
contactHeadline: I'd love to hear what you're working on.
contactSub: Ventura, California — open to remote, travel, and interesting problems.
